purpose: Retry exactly one extended qwen full current-suite no-cache Promptfoo cell after the first Stream 35 session crashed before producing a row.
sourceTruthReadBeforeLoad: live git pull --ff-only / git status --short / lms ps / nvidia-smi

runtimeBefore.gitPull: Already up to date before the run; later git log confirmed 8e36da3 Add matrix run progress telemetry was present before Stream 35 commit work.
runtimeBefore.nvidiaSmi: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2080 Super with Max-Q Design, 8192 MiB total, 276 MiB used, 7712 MiB free, 2% utilization

command.scopeGuard: Exactly one Promptfoo-backed full current-suite cell; no task filter, no alternate profile, no other model, no retry.

abandonedCrashArtifact.assessment: Zero-byte JSONL from the crashed first Stream 35 session; retained as abandoned crash evidence only, not a completed matrix row.

promptfooLatestStatus.assessment: Stream 35 timed out before Promptfoo wrote a new output; promptfoo-latest.json still points to the Stream 34 31B-QAT surface.

cacheEvidence.note: The timeout stderr tail no longer includes the Promptfoo no-cache banner, unlike Stream 22, because run-matrix preserves only the final stderr slice for timed-out cells. The command environment set EVAL_PROMPTFOO_NO_CACHE=true and run-matrix appends --no-cache when that env var is true.

stream22FullNoCache.result: qwen/qwen3.5-9b@gpu_offload full 40-case no-cache timed out at 1200052 ms before pass totals; stderr confirmed Cache is disabled and 40 cases started.

stream28FilteredNoCache.result: qwen/qwen3.5-9b@gpu_offload build-synthetic-smoke no-cache completed as eval_failed 0/4 in 261012 ms with cached tokens 0; it was a filtered task, not full current suite.

comparisonToPriorQwenNoCache.stream35Delta: The extended full-suite retry ran about twice the Stream 22 cap and still timed out before pass totals. It adds stronger infeasibility/throughput-limit evidence for qwen full-suite no-cache on this rig, but does not produce completed throughput or quality counts.

comparisonArtifacts.reason: The Stream 35 timeout did not refresh results/promptfoo-latest.json and produced no completed Promptfoo output surface. Compare/queue archives would have pointed at stale Stream 34 data, so they were intentionally not generated.

runtimeAfterUnload.lmsPs: No models are currently loaded after unloading qwen/qwen3.5-9b.
runtimeAfterUnload.nvidiaSmi: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2080 Super with Max-Q Design, 8192 MiB total, 360 MiB used, 7628 MiB free, 4% utilization

closedOrSharpened: Sharpened the qwen full 40-case no-cache throughput gap from a 1200s timeout to a 2400s timeout with a concrete full-suite row.
notClosed: Qwen full current-suite no-cache throughput is still not complete because the extended cell timed out before pass totals.
The row has no pass/total counts, no refreshed Promptfoo output, and no user-reviewable local outputs.
Final 3-solid selection, subjective user review, broad/full matrix coverage, broad partial-profile quality/throughput, broad 31B/31B-QAT proof, and final verifier audit remain open.
